nasb.text: So Nathan went to his house. Then the Lord struck the child that Uriah’s widow bore to David, so that he was very sick.

esv.text: Then Nathan went to his house. And the Lord afflicted the child that Uriah’s wife bore to David, and he became sick.

cnv.text: 於是拿單回自己的家去了。 耶和華擊打烏利亞的妻子給大衛所生的孩子，他就害了重病。

ccb.text: 拿单说完，便回家去了。 耶和华击打乌利亚的妻子给大卫生的孩子，使他患重病。
